shared-config.page.title: Shared configurations
shared-config.page.description: Product configuration that is shared across accounts within your organization. Please visit individual product pages to create shared configurations.
shared-config.page.account_not_in_org: This account is not in an organization. Accounts must be a member of an organization to create shared configurations.
shared-config.empty_state.title: No shared configurations
shared-config.empty_state.description_se: Get started by visiting a product page to share configurations with other accounts in your organization.
shared-config.empty_state.description_re: No configurations have been shared with this account yet.
shared-config.empty_state.description_or: No configurations have been shared within this organization yet.
shared-config.empty_state.no_matching_de: No configurations match the selected filters. Try adjusting your filters.
shared-config.delete.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete this shared configuration?
shared-config.delete.confirm_description: Deleting this shared configuration will remove it from all accounts it is shared with.
